skills.name: Roll the dice
tooltips:
Rolls a dice (1-6) and applies that many random buffs to yourself for 30s from a pool of possible effects.

Cannot be used again while the effects are still active.

Possible buffs:
- Applies buff (self) for 10s: Roll the dice: ATK
+30 Attack
- Applies buff (self) for 10s: Roll the dice: Armor penetration
+25 % Armor Penetration
- Applies buff (self) for 10s: Roll the dice: ASPD
+10 Attack Speed
- Applies buff (self) for 10s: Roll the dice: CRIT
+30 % Critical
- Applies buff (self) for 10s: Roll the dice: CRIT Damage
+40 % Critical Damage
- Applies buff (self) for 10s: Roll the dice: FLEE
+20 Flee
